untranslatable_reason: Signal requires (1) 2+ standard deviations from 20-period MA — price_pos_20 provides normalized price position but not explicit standard deviation calculation; (2) ATR vs 90th percentile of last 60 bars — cannot compute historical percentile rank without custom lookback aggregation; (3) reversal candlepattern detection (pin bar, engulfing) — no pattern recognition indicators available; (4) profit target at 50% of prior move amplitude — requires historical swing tracking not available in indicator set.
translation_notes: Approximated using price_pos_20 (price deviation from SMA) as proxy for extreme levels. Used hvol_20 as volatility benchmark instead of 90th percentile calculation. Mapped volume spike via vol_ratio_20. Reversal candlepattern condition cannot be translated. Exit conditions use pivot levels (S1/R1) as directional reversal proxies instead of prior move amplitude targets. Context-dependent direction allows both LONG and SHORT entries based on market extremes.
